mapper.select: SELECT * FROM todos WHERE todo_id = #{todoId} AND is_deleted = false
mapper.update: UPDATE todos SET title = #{title}, content = #{content}, todo_date = #{todoDate}, status = #{status}, priority = #{priority}, completed_at = #{completedAt}, is_deleted = #{isDeleted}, updated_at = #{updatedAt} WHERE todo_id = #{todoId} AND user_id = #{userId} AND is_deleted = false
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM todos WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND todo_date = #{todoDate} AND is_deleted = false ORDER BY FIELD(priority, 'HIGH', 'MEDIUM', 'LOW'), todo_id ASC
